creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Gerard Amailland <gerard.amailland@jouy.inra.fr> writes:

> Hello
>
> The problem is solved.
> I added these two lines in xorg.conf
>
> Section "ServerLayout"
>
> Option "AllowEmptyInput"  "false"
> Option "AutoAddDevices" "false"
>
> With Xorg 7.5.1 these two lines are not necessary.
> With Xorg 7.5.2 I need these two lines
>
> I remember that my computer is a laptop DELL E6410
> Nvidia NVS 3100M  --> kde4.8.3   OpenGL
>
> Good day
>
> Gerard

Thanks for the information. I'm replying with bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
CC'ed so that your message is logged in the PR.
